notes: Native-voice TTS at a natural ~175 wpm reading pace. Expect high accuracy, fluency, and prosody scores (roughly 80+).

Same script as sample-clear-pace, same voice, spoken at ~220 wpm. Words should still be individually accurate (clear TTS articulation), but fluency/prosody should score noticeably lower than sample-clear-pace, dragging the overall score down. This is the app's key nuance: a speaker can pronounce every word correctly and still lose points for pace/rhythm.
